topics.label: Installation
topics.description: Install Vale. Uses generational references for memory safety without GC or borrow checker.

topics.label: Variables & Types
topics.description: int, str, bool, float. Mutable by default, use final for immutable.

topics.label: Structs & Interfaces
topics.description: struct for data, interface for contracts. Single ownership by default.

topics.label: Generational References
topics.description: References track object generations. Use-after-free detected at runtime (zero overhead in release).

topics.label: Control Flow
topics.description: if/else, while, each, match. Familiar C-like syntax.

topics.label: Generics
topics.description: Generic functions and structs with type parameters.

topics.label: Regions
topics.description: Isolate memory regions for safe concurrency without data races.
